card.name: Symbiotic Relationship
card.property: Team-Up (Spider-Man and Venom). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy. Heal 1 damage from Venom and Spider-Man

card.name: Shocker
card.property: Steady. When Defeated: Remove 5 threat from a side scheme. Flip this card.

property.name: Quote
property.value: “I can liquefy your brains with these vibrations!”

alternate.name: Shocker
alternate.property: Steady. In expert mode, Shocker gains stalwart. When Defeated: Deal 1 damage to each hero. Remove 10 threat from a side scheme. Flip this card.

property.name: Quote
property.value: “I can liquefy your bones with these vibrations!”

card.name: Shock Party
card.property: Contents: Shocker (A). (Shocker (B) instead for expert mode.) Shocker, City in Chaos, Power Drain II, and Standard III encounters sets. One modular encounter set (recommended: Crime Wave). Setup: Search the encounter deck for The Long Night side scheme and reveal it. Remove each obligation card in the encounter deck from the game.

alternate.name: Shock Party

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for the Vibro-Shock Gauntlets attachment and reveal it.

alternate.property: New York City has lost power, a blackout. Shocker is lighting up Times Square, claiming responsibility and looking for a fight.

card.name: Look Who Finally Showed
card.property: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for the Rhino minion and put him into play engaged with the first player. Search the encounter deck and discard pile for the Grand Larceny side scheme and reveal it. (Shuffle.)

alternate.name: Look Who Finally Showed

property.name: Text
property.value: Forced Response: After Shocker or Rhino is defeated, remove 1[per_hero] threat from this scheme.

alternate.property: “We're getting paid to rob a bank? Hahaha, that's a win-win! My two favorite things - breakin...and takin!”

card.name: The Gang's All Here

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: In player order, each player not engaged with unique minion ([unique]) searches the encounter deck and discard pile for a unique minion ([unique]) and reveals it.

card.property: Shocker puts out the call for all of New York's super villains to aid him in killing the heroes, promising them a cut of his pay.

alternate.name: The Gang's All Here
alternate.property: Vibro-Shock Gauntlets gains permanent. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.
Shocker has new tech and powerful allies. Their only goal - create chaos and terror.

card.name: Vibro-Shock Gauntlets
card.property: Setup. Attach to Shocker. [star] Forced Response: AfterShocker attacks and damages you, discard a card from your hand. Hero Action: Spend [mental][physical] resources and remove a stunned or confused status card from Shocker → discard Vibro-Shock Gauntlets. [star]Boost: Reveal this card.

card.name: Sandman
card.property: Toughness. [star] Forced Response: After Sandman attacks or engages you, discard the top 6 cards of the encounter deck.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "I need the money for my Daughter! Kingpin better pay up..." -Sandman

property.name: Text
property.value: Forced Response (Hero): After Scorpion engages you, stun your hero.

card.name: Vulture
card.property: Quickstrike. Forced Response: After Vulture engages you, discard 1 random card from your hand unless your identity has the [[aerial ]] trait.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "I trust that the kingpin will pay. I trust you less, Shocker..." -Vulture

card.name: Feedback
card.property: When Revealed: Stun your identity and Shocker. Discard your hand. Draw up to your hand size. [star] Boost: Discard your hand. Draw up to your hand size.

card.name: Ionic Boots
card.property: Attach to Shocker. [star] Forced Response: After Shocker attacks and damages you, place 2 threat on the main scheme. Hero Action: Spend [energy][mental][physical] resources → discard this card.

card.name: Grand Larceny
card.property: Threat cannot be removed from The Long Night. Hero Response (thwart): After a [[criminal ]]minion is defeated, remove 5 threat from Grand Larceny. [crisis]
Criminals in New York are on a a crime spree, robbing every business they come across.

card.name: The Getaway
card.property: When Revealed: Choose one: • Heal 3 damage from Shocker. Shocker schemes. • If the Vibro-Shock Gauntlets attachment is not in play, search the encounter deck and discard pile for it and reveal it.

card.name: The Check Cleared
card.property: Surge. When Revealed: Place threat on The Long Night equal to the combined SCH of each [[criminal ]]enemy in play.

card.name: Get Shocked!
card.property: When Revealed: Stun your identity. Deal 1 damage to each hero. [star] Boost: Discard your hand. Draw up to your hand size.
“I bet you're shocked to see me.”

card.name: The Long Night
card.property: Setup. Permanent. Hinder 15[per_hero]. The players cannot win unless they survive the night. Reponse: After a [[criminal ]]minion is defeated, remove 2 threat from The Long Night. Forced Interrupt: When the last threat is removed from this scheme, the players survive the night and win the game.

card.name: Power Drain
card.property: When Defeated: Discard 2 cards from the encounter deck. Each player must choose and discard 1 resource of any type from their hand for each boost icon discarded this way. [acceleration]

card.name: Electro
card.property: [star] Forced Response: After Electro attacks you, discard 1 card from the encounter deck. Take 1 indirect damage for each boost icon discarded this way. [star] Boost: Discard 3 cards from the encounter deck.

card.name: Electromagnetic Pulse
card.property: When Revealed: Discard 7 cards from the encounter deck. If an Electro minion was discarded this way, put that minion into play engaged with you. If Electro was not discarded this way, this card gains surge. [star] Boost: Discard 3 cards from the encounter deck.

card.name: Lightning Bolt
card.property: When Revealed: Discard 2 cards from the encounter deck. Take 1 indirect damage for each boost icon discarded this way. [star] Boost: Discard 3 cards from the encounter deck.

card.name: Shock Therapy
card.property: When Revealed: Discard 1[per_hero] cards from the encounter deck. The villain heals 1 damage for each boost icon discarded this way. [star] Boost: Discard 3 cards from the encounter deck.

card.name: Electro
card.property: [star] Electro gets +1 hit point for each [energy] resource attached to her. [star] Forced Response: After Electro engages you or activates against you, choose 1 card from your hand with a printed [energy] resource and attach it to her.

property.name: Text
property.value: Forced Response: After Electro activates against you, discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a treachery is discarded.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "You think that's bad? You just wait!"

card.name: Electro
card.property: When Revealed: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a copy of A.I.M. Scientist is discarded. Put it into play engaged with the first player. Forced Response: After Electro activates against you, discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a treachery is discarded.

property.name: Text
property.value: Forced Response: After Electro activates against you, discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a treachery with 1 or more boost icons is discarded. Then, discard an equal number of cards from the top of your deck.

card.name: Energized!
card.property: Contents: Electro (I) and Electro (II). (Electro (II) and Electro (III) instead for expert.) Electro, Power Drain, and Standard encounter sets. 1 modular encounter set (Sinister Assault). Setup: Find the Electricty Clones and Grounded environments and put them into play. Advance to stage 1B.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Electro has teamed up with A.I.M. to help boost his already deadly electricity abilities. With access to dark matter energy, pure electricity form, and even electric clones of himself, he's no joke anymore.

alternate.name: Energized!
alternate.property: Forced Response: After step 1 of the villain phase ends, heal 1 damage from the villain for each acceleration token and icon ([acceleration]) in play. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

card.name: Electricity Clones
card.property: Setup. Permanent. Electro ignores the unique rule. (Multiple copies of Electro can be in play, but "Forced Response" abilities on a copy of Electro can still only be triggered by that particular copy.)

property.name: Quote
property.value: "I saw him do that in a video game once!" -Deadpool

card.name: Grounded
card.property: Setup. Permanent. While the total cost of all upgrades and supports in play is less than 10[per_hero], the villain cannot be defeated. Forced Response: After the villain is defeated, remove this card from the game [arrow] each player draws 2 cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: Attach to the villain. The attached villain gets +1 Scheme. Forced Response: After the villain schemes, place an [acceleration] token here. Hero Action: Discard each card from the encounter deck → discard this card.

card.name: Lightning Speed
card.property: Attach to the villain. Forced Response: After a copy of Electro enters play, place an acceleration token here. Hero Action: Discard each card from the encounter deck [acceleration] discard this card.

card.name: A.I.M. Scientist
card.property: When Defeated: Find the Dark Matter Conversion side scheme and reveal it. [star] Boost: Place an acceleration token on an ally.

property.name: Text
property.value: [star] Forced Response: After Black Cat engages you or schemes, discard the top 2 cards of the encounter deck. Deal each card with a star icon ([star]) discarded this way to yourself as a facedown encounter card.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Max, there's nothing you can do that'd shock me!"

card.name: Electro
card.property: [star] Forced Response: After Electro attacks and damages you, discard the top 7 cards of your deck. When Defeated: Remove 4 threat from a side scheme.

card.name: Electro
card.property: [star] Forced Response: After Electro attacks and damages you, discard the top 7 cards of your deck. When Defeated: Remove 4 threat from a side scheme.

card.name: Accelerated Plans
card.property: Forced Response: After this side scheme enters play, place 2 threat here for each acceleration icon and token in play.

card.name: Dark Matter Conversion
card.property: The villain gets +2 ATK and gains retaliate 1. When Revealed: Place 1 additional threat here for each acceleration token and icon ([acceleration]) in play.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "That Quantum Field Generator is no joke. It'll let Electro harness the power of Dark Matter, too." -Spider-Man

card.name: Charging

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a minion is discarded. If that minion is Electro, put it into play and it gains quickstrike. Otherwise, this card gains surge.

card.property: "Ever heard lightning never strikes twice? All lies." —Electro

card.name: High Voltage
card.property: When Revealed (Alter-Ego): Discard the top 5 cards of your deck. When Revealed (Hero): Discard the top 5 cards of the encounter deck. [star] Boost: Discard the top 3 cards of the encounter deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: Heal 3 damage from each copy of Electro in play. If 3 or fewer damage was healed this way, this card gains surge.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Time to get a little extra juice!" —Electro

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck equal to the number of cards in your hand. If 3 or fewer cards were discarded this way, this card gains surge.

card.name: The Lizard
card.property: Each [[reptilian ]]enemy gest +1 ATK for each formula counter here. Forced Interrupt: When the Lizard would be defeated, instead: discard each attachment from him, remove each formula counter from here, place 1[per_hero] sanity counters on Lizard Brain, and flip card.

alternate.name: Curt Connors
alternate.property: [star] Forced Interrupt: When Curt Connors would attack, remove 1 sanity counter from Lizard Brain instead. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Curt Connors schemes, this activation removes threat instead of placing it. After this activation, remove 1 sanity counter from Lizard Brain.

card.name: Chasing Down The Lizard
card.property: After tampering by the Kingpin and A.I.M., the Lizard is rampaging through the city! Contents: The Lizard (A). The Lizard and Standard encounter sets. Two modular encounter sets (City Sewers and Down to Earth). Setup: Reveal the Lizard Brain attachment. Place 1 formula counter on The Lizard. In expert mode, place 1 additional formula counter on The Lizard.

alternate.name: Chasing Down The Lizard
alternate.property: Forced Interrupt: When the last threat is removed from this scheme, advance to stage 2A (the players win by advancing). If Curt Connors is in play, remove all sanity counters from Lizard Brain, and each player draws 1 card for each sanity counter removed this way. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

card.name: The Cure
card.property: The heroes have lured the Lizard back to his lab. Can they cobble together a cure for Connors? When Revealed: Place 1 formula counter on The Lizard. Search the encounter deck and discard pile for Regenerative Research and reveal it. Place 2[per_hero] threat on Regenerative Research.

alternate.name: The Cure
alternate.property: Alter-Ego Action: If you control a [[genius ]]character, spend [mental][mental] resources → remove 4 threat from here. (Limit once per round per player). If this stage is completed, the players lose the game. If there is no threat here and the Lizard is not in play, the players win the game.

card.name: Lizard Brain
card.property: Setup. Permanent. In expert mode, each minion gains the [[reptilian ]]trait. [star] Forced Response: After the last sanity counter is removed from here, flip Curt Connors, then set The Lizard's hit point dial to his printed hit points.

card.name: Viper Fangs
card.property: Attach to the villain. [star] Forced Interrupt: When attached villain attacks, the attack gains piercing. If that attack deals damage to an identity, place 1 threat on the main scheme. [star] Boost: Attach this card to The Lizard.

card.name: Reptilian Regeneration
card.property: Attach to the [[reptilian ]]enemy with the highest printed hit points without another Reptilian Regeneration attached. If you cannot, this card gains surge. Forced Interrupt: When the villain phase begins, heal 1[per_hero] damage from attached enemy.

card.name: Super Reptile
card.property: Attach to The Lizard. Otherwise, Super Reptile gains surge. Attached villain gains the [[brute ]]trait. [star] Boost: Attach this card to The Lizard.

card.name: Experimental Injection
card.property: Attach to a minion without the [[reptilian ]]trait. Otherwise, attach to the minion with the least remaining hit points. If you cannot, this card gains surge. Attached minion gains the [[reptilian ]]trait and gets +4 hit points.

card.name: Lizardmen
card.property: Toughness. [star] Boost: Give the villain a tough status card.

card.name: Giant Alligator
card.property: Quickstrike. Patrol. When Revealed: Discard the top 5 cards of your deck. “Dungeon boss: most ginormous alligator ever.” -Ms. Marvel

card.name: Princess Python
card.property: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for a copy of Experimental Injection and attach it to Princess Python. Forced Response: After Princess Python attacks you, take 2 indirect damage.

card.name: Regenerative Research
card.property: Hinder 1[per_hero]. Forced Interrupt: When the villain phase begins, heal 1 damage from each [[reptilian ]]enemy. [hazard] “Let the warm-blooded weaklings who inherited the earth through the cosmic fluke _ of a meteor crash beware!”

card.name: Scaly Setback
card.property: The Lizard gets +10 hit points. [crisis] [star] Boost: If the villain is attacking, this attack gains overkill.

card.name: Martha and Billy
card.property: Surge. When Revealed: Place 1 sanity counter on Lizard Brain. “Curtis Connors was a good husband, a good father! His son, Billy, adored him... and so did I!” — Martha Connors

card.name: In Cold Blood
card.property: When Revealed (Alter-Ego): If The Lizard is in play, discard 1 card at random from your hand. When Revealed (Hero): The Lizard attacks you. You cannot play events until after that attack resolves. If no attack was made this way, this card gains surge.

card.name: Stegron
card.property: [star] Boost: Give the villain a tough status card. Put this minion into play engaged with you. “STEGRON, THE DINOSAUR MAN, will bring a new world of dinosaurs - born in blood and terror!”

card.name: Trapped in the Pipes
card.property: Attach to your identity. Negate 1. (After this card is revealed or turned faceup during an enemy activation, if any of its effects are canceled, the revealing player draws 1 card.) [star] Forced Response: After you change form, discard this card. [star] Boost: You are confused.

card.name: Ceiling Collapse
card.property: Negate 2. (After this card is revealed or turned faceup during an enemy activation, if any of its effects are canceled, the revealing player draws 2 cards.) When Revealed: Reveal the top card of the encounter deck. [star] Boost: Deal yourself 1 facedown encounter card.

card.name: We're Totally Lost
card.property: Negate 1. (After this card is revealed or turned faceup during an enemy activation, if any of its effects are canceled, the revealing player draws 1 card.) When Revealed: You are confused. If you are already confused, choose and discard 1 card you control.

card.name: Vulture
card.property: Vulture cannot be attacked during the player phase unless the attacker or attack has the [[aerial ]]trait, or the attack has ranged. “It's only a matter of time before I crush you!”

card.name: Vulture
card.property: Vulture cannot be attacked during the player phase unless the attacker or attack has the [[aerial ]]trait, or the attack has ranged. When Revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for Feather Daggers and reveal it. “It's only a matter of time before I crush you!”

card.name: Vulture
card.property: Vulture cannot be attacked during the player phase unless the attacker or attack has the [[aerial ]]trait, or the attack has ranged. When Revealed: Deal each player an encounter card. “It's only a matter of time before I crush you!”

card.name: Surveillance Pigeons
card.property: Contents: Vulture (I) and Vulture (II). (Vulture (II) and Vulture (III) for expert mode.) Vulture and Standard III encounter sets. One modular encounter set (recommended: A.I.M. Abduction). Setup: Each player puts a Wingsuit upgrade into play under their control. Put each copy of Aerial Advantage into play.

card.name: Surveillance Pigeons
card.property: [[bird. ]]Forced Interrupt: When you would remove any amount of threat from this scheme, remove 3 pigeon counters from here instead. Interrupt: When you would discard a random card from your hand, you may place 2 pigeon counters here instead. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

card.name: The Vulture's Plans
card.property: When Revealed: Discard 1 card at random from each player's hand. Place 1 threat on the main scheme for each different resource type discarded this way. "Spider-Man will pay for interfering with my plans!" —The Vulture

card.name: Sweeping Swoop
card.property: Surge. When Revealed: Stun your hero. __________________________________ [star] Boost: If this activation deals damage to a friendly character, stun that character.

card.name: Falling
card.property: Peril. When Revealed: Choose: • Exhaust an [[aerial ]]card you control. • Discard 3 cards from your hand at random. • Take 5 damage.

card.name: Vulturion
card.property: Quickstrike. Vulnerable. When Defeated: Discard 1 card at random from the engaged player's hand. [star] Boost: Discard 1 card at random from your hand.

card.name: Fisk Helicopter
card.property: Patrol. Steady. Vulnerable. When Defeated: Choose: • Spend 2 resources of the same type. • Place 2 threat on a scheme. The defeating player takes 2 indirect damage.

card.name: Aggressive Surveillance
card.property: Characters with the [[aerial ]]trait remove 1 additional threat when thwarting this scheme. When Defeated: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for the Fisk Helicopter minion and reveal it. [amplify][crisis]

card.name: Highway Robbery
card.property: When Revealed: Each player places a random card from their hand facedown here. When Defeated: Return each facedown card here to its owner's hand. [acceleration]

card.name: Aerial Dogfight
card.property: Hinder 2[per_hero]. Reduce the damage each [[aerial ]]character takes from each attack by 2 unless the attacker or attack has the [[aerial ]]trait, or the attack has ranged. [hazard]

card.name: Aerial Advantage
card.property: Setup. Surge. Attach to the Vulture. Forced Interrupt: When any amount of damage would be dealt to Vulture, discard Aerial Advantage instead. Place 1 pigeon counter on the main scheme. “My wings give me the ultimate high ground!”

card.name: Anti-Gravitational Harness
card.property: Attach to your identity. Attached character gains the [[aerial ]]trait. Alter-Ego Action: Discard a card from your hand and place 2 pigeon counters on the main scheme → discard this card. [hazard]

card.name: Feather Daggers
card.property: Attach to Vulture. [star] Vulture's attacks gain piercing and ranged. Hero Response: After Vulture attacks you, discard Feather Daggers → Vulture activates against you. “Guess Vulture had some upgrades of his own!” -Spider-Man

card.name: Aviator Goggles
card.property: Attach to Vulture and place 2 pigeon counters on the main scheme. Vulture gains steady. Hero Response: After you attack and damage Vulture, spend an [energy] resource → discard Aviator Goggles.

card.name: Wingsuit
card.property: Setup. Permanent. Hero Interrupt: When you play an ally or event card, exhaust Wingsuit → that card gains the [[aerial ]]trait until the end of the phase.

card.name: Kingpin
card.property: Toughness. Steady. When Revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for Kingpin's Suit and reveal it. “You embarassed me in front of Vanessa.”

card.name: Kingpin
card.property: Toughness. Steady. When Revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for the Kingpin's Suit and Kingpin's Cane attachments and attach them to Kingpin.“You embarassed me in front of Vanessa.”

card.name: Kingpin
card.property: Toughness. Stalwart. When Revealed: Each player puts the top card of their deck into play facedown as a [[corrupt ]]side scheme. Search the encounter deck and discard pile for Kingpin's Suit and reveal it. “You embarassed me in front of Vanessa.”

card.name: Shadow of the Kingpin
card.property: Wilson Fisk is the Kingpin, the feared crime lord of New York City. Thanks to media manipulation from A.I.M., he is also the mayor of New York City. Contents: Kingpin and Standard III encounters sets. One modular encounter set (recommended: Crime Wave). Setup: Find Fisk Tower and put it into play. Place 1[per_hero] counters on Pursued by the Past.

alternate.name: Shadow of the Kingpin
alternate.property: Deep Pockets — Forced Response: After resolving step one of the villain phase, the first player places 1 pursuit counter on Pursued by the Past. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game. “It's Hard To Come To Terms With Our Violent Nature.” -Mayor Wilson Fisk

card.name: Fisk Tower
card.property: Setup. Each facedown [[corrupt ]]side scheme has starting threat equal to the villain's stage number. Forced Response: After step one of the villain phase, heal 1 damage from Kingpin and Kingpin's Suit for each [[corrupt ]]side scheme in play.

card.name: King's Gambit
card.property: When Revealed: Put the top card of your deck into play facedown as a [[corrupt ]]side scheme. Kingpin schemes. [star] Boost: Discard 1 card from the top of the encounter deck for each pursuit counter on Pursued by the Past.

card.name: Long Live the King
card.property: When Revealed: Put the top card of your deck into play facedown as a [[corrupt ]]side scheme. Place 1 pursuit counter on Pursued by the Past. “I won't stand for it.”

card.name: Controlling the Narrative
card.property: Incite 1. Attach to the non-permanent side scheme with the most remaining threat without another copy of Controlling the Narrative attached. If you cannot, this card gains surge. Attached scheme gains the [acceleration][crisis] icons.

card.name: Kingpin's Suit
card.property: Attach to Kingpin. Forced Interrupt: When any amount of damage would be dealt to Kingpin, place it here instead. Then, if there is at least 10 damage here, discard Kingpin's Suit. [star] Boost: Attach Kingpin's Suit to Kingpin.

card.name: Kingpin's Cane
card.property: Attach to Kingpin. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Kingpin initiates an attack against you, put the top card of your deck into play facedown as a [[corrupt ]]side scheme. Hero Action: Spend [physical][physical][physical] resources → discard this card. [star] Boost: After this activation, attach this card to Kingpin.

card.name: Typhoid Mary
card.property: [star] Typhoid Mary's attacks deal indirect damage. When Revealed: Take 1 indirect damage for each pursuit counter on Pursued by the Past. “And the thing is... I didn't even eat the cheese.”

card.name: Lady Bullseye
card.property: Quickstrike. Vulnerable. (Discard this character if it is stunned or confused.) When Defeated: Place 2 pursuit counters on Pursued by the Past. “The first time I killed a man, all I felt was... impatience to do it again.”

card.name: Devil's Reign
card.property: [[corrupt. ]]Wilson Fisk's hubris as mayor of New York has cast the city in the waiting arms of a cadre of dangerous and deadly super villains! [hazard][hazard]

card.name: “Legitimate Business”
card.property: [[corrupt. ]]The Kingpin. On paper he was a shadow. A businessman. He was careful not to leave a trail... Hinder 1[per_hero]. When Defeated: The first player discards cards from the top of the encounter deck until an attachment is discarded and reveals that card. [amplify]

card.name: FBI Investigation
card.property: Forced Response: After a card you control defeats a side scheme, place 1 clue counter here. Then, if there are at least 3 clue counters here, discard this card and place 1 pursuit counter on Pursued by the Past. [acceleration]

card.name: Prey for Mercy
card.property: “We are going to fight, Kaine. One predator against another. And one of us will die.” -Kraven the Hunter Threat cannot be removed from this scheme while Kraven the Hunter is in play. (Prey for Mercy is a nemesis side scheme.) [hazard]

card.name: Kraven the Hunter
card.property: Steady. Villainous. [star] Forced Response: After Kraven the Hunter attacks and damages you, exhaust 1 upgrade or support you control. (Kraven the Hunter is a nemesis minion.) “Let the hunt... begin!”

card.name: Mancatcher Net
card.property: When Revealed: Choose and discard the lowest-cost support or upgrade you control. Stun your identity. “I'll be head to heels in blood tonight...” -Kraven the Hunter

card.name: Tiger
card.property: Quickstrike. [star] Tiger's attacks gain piercing. “ROAR!” [star] Boost: If this activation is an attack, it gains piercing.

card.name: Pit Trap
card.property: Attach to your identity and take 1 damage. Forced Interrupt: When attached character would ready, discard this card instead. [star] Boost: Attach this card to your identity.

property.name: Text
property.value: Surge. Vulnerable. (Discard this character if it is stunned or confused.)

property.name: Text
property.value: Guard. Vulnerable. (Discard this character if it is stunned or confused.)

card.name: Crime Pays
card.property: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck for a [[criminal ]]minion and put it into play engaged with you. (Shuffle.) If no minion was put into play this way, this card gains surge. [acceleration]

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a [[criminal ]]minion is discarded. Reveal that minion, then give that minion a tough status card and the villain 1 facedown boost card.

card.name: “Vote for Fisk”
card.property: Standard Mode Only. [star] Forced Response: After the villain schemes, place 2 threat on the scheme with the lowest amount of threat. “We can no longer rely on Superhumans in New York City. The Avengers, the X-Men, and least of all, The Spiders.”

alternate.name: “Vote for Fisk”
alternate.property: Expert Mode Only. [star] Forced Response: After the villain schemes, place 2 threat on the scheme with the lowest amount of threat. [acceleration][hazard]

card.name: Bodyguard
card.property: Search the encounter deck for the minion with the highest printed hit points and put it into play with you with Bodyguard attached to it. Attached minion gains the [[elite ]]trait, guard, and gets +2 hit points. Forced Interrupt: When attached minion is defeated, shuffle it into the encounter deck from the encounter discard pile. “I get paid by the punch.”

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: If the Bodyguard attachment is not in play, discard each non-[[elite]] minion engaged with you. Place 1 threat on the main scheme for each minion discarded this way. Search the encounter deck and discard pile for the Bodyguard attachment and reveal it. Otherwise, this card gains surge.

card.name: Bodyguard
card.property: Guard. (While this minion is engaged with you, you cannot attack the villain.) [star] Boost: Choose to give the villain a tough status card or heal 4 damage from the villain. If you cannot, put this card into play engaged with you.

card.name: Multiverse Recruit
card.property: Attached minion ignores the unique rule and gains Victory 0. When Revealed: Search your collection for a nemesis minion and put it into play engaged with you with Multiverse Recruit attached. (Limit once per minion per campaign.) “This round goes to you fair spider. But you shall hear again from the Six Men of Sinestry.”

card.name: The Great Web
card.property: Setup. Surge. The unique rule does not apply to each [[web-warrior]] character and each card with “Spider” in its title. “We learn from our mistakes, Peter. But new challenges will arise, and when they do... the Web-Warriors will be there to meet them.”

card.name: Green Goblin
card.property: When Revealed: Take 2 indirect damage. Shuffle each [[tech ]]attachment in the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. “Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha hahahaha haha!” -Green Goblin

card.name: Hobgoblin
card.property: When Revealed: Take 2 indirect damage. Shuffle each [[tech ]]attachment in the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. “Hahahahahahahaahaaaaaha!”

card.name: Great Web Strand
card.property: Setup. Hero Response: After you change form, discard Great Web Strand → search your deck and discard pile for a [[web-warrior]] ally or an ally with “Spider” in its title and add it to your hand.

card.name: Spider-Girl
card.property: Response: After Spider-Girl enters play or leaves play, choose: • Ready your hero. • Heal 1 damage from your alter-ego.

card.name: Spider-UK
card.property: Toughness. Response: After Spider-UK enters play, give another [[web-warrior]] character a tough status card. If you cannot, discard cards from the top of your deck until you discard an ally and add it to your hand. “british quote here!”

card.name: Great Web Warrior
card.property: Setup. You gain the [[web-warrior]] trait. You get +2 hit points. The portal opens to reveal the dimension designated Earth-001.

card.name: Earth-001
card.property: Setup. Permanent. You may include [[web-warrior]] allies from any aspect in your deck during deckbuilding. “So, Karn. How've you been? You're not feeling...hungry or anything, are you?” -Anya

card.name: Web-Warriors
card.property: Play under any player's control. Max 1 [[team ]]card per player. Each of your [[web-warrior]] allies gets +1 hit point and +1 ATK. “Battleplan Normandy! Take it to 'em!” -Spider-UK

card.name: Spider-Man Noir
card.property: Response: After Spider-Man Noir leaves play, heal 4 damage from your identity. “Wherever I go the wind follows, and the wind... smells like rain.”

card.name: Spider-Man
card.property: Response: After Spider-Man leaves play, remove 4 threat from a scheme. "Being Spider-Man is so easy!"

property.name: Text
property.value: Response: After Arana leaves play, deal 5 damage to an enemy.

card.name: Master Weaver
card.property: Each [[web-warrior]] ally gets +1 hit point for each boost icon ([boost]) tucked under them. Response: After a [[web-warrior]] ally enters play, tuck the top card of the encounter deck under that ally.

card.name: Radioactive Spider
card.property: Setup. Action: Discard Radioactive Spider → deal 1 damage to your identity. You get +2 hand size until the end of the phase.

card.name: Venom Blast
card.property: Hero Action (attack): Deal 5 damage to an enemy. (This card is both a Web of Deceit Campaign Reward card and an Aggression card.)

card.name: Wallcrawl
card.property: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a scheme. If this removes the last threat from that scheme, draw 2 cards. (This card is both a Web of Deceit Campaign Reward card and a Justice card.)

card.name: Spider-Healing Factor
card.property: You get +3 hit points. Response: After your turn begins, exhaust Spider-Healing Factor → heal 1 damage from your identity. (This card is both a Web of Deceit Campaign Reward card an a Pool card.)

card.name: Proportionate Strength and Speed
card.property: You get +3 hit points and your hero gets +1 DEF and +1 ATK. (This card is both a Web of Deceit Campaign Reward card and a Protection card.)

card.name: Doppelganger
card.property: Response: After Doppelganger leaves play, search your deck and discard pile for a [[superpower ]]card and add it to your hand. (This card is both a Web of Deceit Campaign Reward card and a Leadership card.)

card.name: Dynamo
card.property: Uses (3 energy counters). Response: After you play a [[superpower ]]card, remove 1 energy counter from Dynamo → stun an enemy and deal 2 damage to it.

card.name: Camouflage
card.property: Uses (3 energy counters). Response: After you play a [[superpower ]]card, remove 1 energy counter from Camouflage→ confuse an enemy and give your identity a tough status card.

card.name: Spider-Tingle
card.property: Setup. Interrupt: When you reveal a treachery, discard Spider-Tingle → cancel the “When Revealed” effects of that treachery. “It's his Spider-Sense!”

card.name: Spider-Sense
card.property: Hero Interrupt: When the villain initiates an attack against you, draw 1 card. “Thanks Spidey-Sense!”

card.name: Clairvoyant Sight
card.property: Setup. Permanent. You gain the [[psionic ]]trait. “The threads of destiny are never still. I see where they lead… if you dare to follow.” -Madame Web.

card.name: Sensing Trouble
card.property: Hero Action (thwart): Ready your identity → remove 3 threat from a scheme. “Trouble nearby, I better investigate!”

card.name: Team Spider-Sense
card.property: Alliance. Interrupt: When a treachery card is revealed from the encounter deck, cancel its "When Revealed" effects. Each player draws 1 card.

card.name: Arachno-Telepathy
card.property: Action (thwart): Exhaust Arachno-Telepathy, and discard 1 card from the encounter deck → remove 1 threat from a scheme for each icon ([boost] or [star]) discarded this way. “We can eat them, right? Asking for a friend.” —Spiders-Man

card.name: Backflip
card.property: Hero Interrupt (defense): When your hero would take any amount of damage from an enemy attack, prevent all of that damage. “Whoops!” - Silk

card.name: See the Future
card.property: Victory 0. When Defeated: Each player draws 2 cards. Until the end of the round, play with the top card of the encounter deck faceup. “New skeins of being sewn....” -Julia Carpenter, Madame Web

card.name: Madame Web
card.property: Each [[psionic ]]character you control gains the [[web-warrior]] trait. Alter-Ego Action (thwart): Exhaust Madame Web → for each [[web-warrior]] card you control, choose a scheme and remove 1 threat from it.

card.name: Web-Shooter
card.property: Setup. Uses (3 web counters.) Hero Resource: Exhaust Web-Shooter and remove 1 web counter from it → generate a [wild] resource.

card.name: Quick Reload
card.property: Hero Action: Choose two of the following (you may choose the same option twice): • Ready a [[tech ]]card you control. • Place 1 all-purpose counter on a [[tech ]]upgrade you control. “I need to whip up a new batch of web fluid soon...” - Spider-Man

card.name: Spider-Bots
card.property: Uses (4 bot counters). Hero Action (thwart): Exhaust Spider-Bots and remove 1 bot counter from here → remove threat from a scheme equal to the total number of printed [mental] and [wild] resources in your hand.

card.name: Bag Head
card.property: Victory 1. Action: Add Bag Head to the victory display→ change to hero form. Draw up to your hand size.

property.name: Quote
property.value: “I'm a symbol of hope... At the very least, I can look cool doing it.” — Spider-Man, India

card.name: Spider-Mobile
card.property: Reduce the cost to play this card by 1 for each [[web-warrior]] card you control. Hero Response: After you defend against an attack, exhaust Spider-Mobile → ready your identity.

card.name: Spider-Boy
card.property: Response: After Spider-Boy enters play or leaves play, remove 1 threat from a scheme. "No need to applaud. Well...maybe some applause would be nice." —Spider-Boy

card.name: Web Swing!
card.property: Hero Action: Ready your hero. Your identity gets +1 to each of its basic powers until the end of the round. “I need to whip up a new batch of web fluid soon...” - Spider-Man

card.name: Webbed
card.property: Attach to an enemy. Attached enemy loses steady and stalwart. Forced Interrupt: When an enemy would activate, discard Webbed instead.

card.name: Power Outage
card.property: Contents: Electro (I) and Electro (II). (Electro (II) and Electro (III) instead for expert mode.) Electro, Power Drain II, and Standard encounters sets. One modular encounter set (recommended A.I.M. Science). Setup: Put the Electricity Clones and Grounded environments into play.

property.name: Text
property.value: [star] Forced Response: After resolving step one of the villain phase, heal 1 damage from the villain for each acceleration token and icon ([acceleration]) in play.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Electro teams up with his girlfriend, A.I.M., Kingpin, and his electro-clones to charge up more than ever before! Can the Spiders stop him?

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: Exhaust each friendly [[TECH]] support and upgrade. Each player discards cards from the encounter deck until they discard an [[A.I.M.]] minion, then reveals that minion. Each player searches their deck and discard pile for a card with a printed [energy] resource and adds it to their hand. (Shuffle.)

property.name: Quote
property.value: The Electros are on the verge of unlimited power, thanks to the science of A.I.M. and the backing of the Kingpin...

alternate.name: Power Surge
alternate.property: * Forced Response: After you resolve an Electro treachery, remove that treachery from the game. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

card.name: A.i.m. Scientist
card.property: Vulnerable. When Defeated: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for the Dark Matter Conversion side scheme and reveal it.
